transcript.text:
[June is Memorial Month in South Korea]
[You will always be remembered in the name of this country]
Hello, everyone It's Tzuyang
Do you know what's special on June 6th?
I wish everyone knows that it's more than just a day off
It is Memorial Day
I am honored to film today with this special opportunity to publicize Memorial Day
[Because of your sacrifice, we are here today]
I came to a restaurant owned by a child of a war veteran (a man of national merit) to commemorate Memorial Day
We are here to learn why we must remember and honor the war veterans
Also, I am excited because the owner said he will prepare a delicious meal for me
Let's head inside
This plaque represents a house of a war veteran. Not only the service member but also the member's family receives the plaque
Welcome~
How are you, sir?
Aren't you Tzuyang? Nice to meet you!

I called earlier to film in here
I'll make something delicious for you Thank you very much
Also, I'd like to listen to your story
Absolutely, sweetie
Thank you very much
Aren't you hungry? (a child of a Korean War veteran)
I'll treat you with our main dish
Try it. You will like it
My wife cooks well
I got you, sweetie Thank you, ma'am
Take out the cucumbers. She doesn't like it. and don't put too much veges in!
[Don-geu-rang-taeng (Pan-fried meat/tofu patties)]
[Dak-bokkeum-tang (Korean Spicy Chicken Stew)]
[Golbaengi-muchim (Spicy whelks and noodles)]
(Enjoy your meal) Thank you very much
Wow this is big

Looks so delicious!
Omg, look at this. Looks so tasty Thank you very much
Wow, the soup is really thick
Look at this gigantic dongeurangtaeng
Normally, dongeurangtaeng has lots of vegetables inside
But it brings the meat scent that bursts in your mouth
Yummy
Golbaengi (Whelk)! This can't go wrong
Wow, this golbaengi-muchim is amazing
Wow, look at the size of the chicken leg
You should eat the bottom part first, grab the bone, and nibble away
You know it!
It's so tasty and super tender
It's so tender compared to its size
It's pretty light on the seasoning but very tasty
Look how crumbling this potato is

Look, It's so easy to smash
Add some soup in it
This potato is fantastic
Dongeurangtaeng
Dip it in soy sauce
It's more like a meat dumpling
It should go well with the soup too
I knew it
I need to slow down and enjoy
No way, I have only 2 potatoes left
One more dongeurangtaeng
It's really tasty with the soup
The bottom part of the wingette
[She's got a skill]
Chicken leg! [It's a wing]
It's so tender

I'm going to shred this chicken breast like the braised potato
It's really delicious
Let me mix the noodles
I'm going to take a big bite
Unbelievable. This is way better than bibimmyeon (spicy Korean cold noodles)
I love it
Oh wow, it's got some pear slices
That's interesting
I'm gonna eat it with my hands
Dongeurangtaeng! I can't get used to its size
Dip it in the stew
Should I eat the potato?
Nah.... I'll save it for later
Look at the skin
Must be really tender
I'm definitely wolfing down

I wish this place was right next to my house
I love the skin!
It just melted in my mouth.
Let's eat the potato
Dongeurang ~ Taeng taeng
I'll dip it in soy sauce for the next one
Golbaengi (whelk) on top
Why am I blowing it when it's cold ?
How can it be this tender?
Compared to the size of the chicken, it's super soft and tender
Oh no, I must have been busy eating.
Let's finish up the golbaengi
Chicken breast!
I'm going to...
shred the chicken breast and smash the potato together
No way

This is fantastic
I love how you munched down all the food
Whoever lost their appetite should watch you eating to get it back
The last piece, chicken wing!
Did you enjoy your meal? I loved it. Thank you!
I think you need more tho..
Oh no, it was perfect, that was a good amount.
Since you enjoyed it, let me talk about the past
Hahaha, yes please
I became the child of a war veteran because my father died in the Korean War
I wish young people understand that they can exist because there exists a country
To celebrate the upcoming Memorial Day, please remind yourself of the love of this country
For sure will do, Sir.
I don't know anything about my father I was only 10 month old baby when he died
He was killed in Baekcheon county, Hwanghae-do, North Korea
His body was left there and, since then, it has not been retrieved.

I only have his memorial tablet at the National Cemetery
[Your sacrifice will always be remembered in our hearts]
I've always been proud of my father
Back then, we actually spent time to think about the fallen heroes on Memorial Day rather than drinking
Sadly, it has changed a lot. I would like to tell everyone that it's more than just a day off.
Memorial day is on June 6th The Korean War broke out on June 25th
We should remember the men and women who sacrificed their lives for our country more often
[Memorial Day] Remembering patriotic martyrs and souls of all the fallen heroes who sacrificed their lives.
